textByHash.7d7814e5286eef565b5a6ee5dd29e224c3e4b721: I'm sorry, but I can't really help you right now. Perhaps you should ask me again later, or try a different camel.
textByHash.c07bced09b02baeb2689815708b062d6dd5f6ee4: Well, just you close your eyes first. I'm not doing it while you're watching me!
textByHash.68357b5792c5ae00fee22c5c8a2c6e925b46fd55: I hope that's what you wanted!
textByHash.27fc70ca5504b7f2bb53bcabd46c8e2042ef7201: Wait, you're a human, aren't you? Have you come from outside this town?
textByHash.413cb3ec64cfb3e00e2bdfe5de9f16c276b85c6e: Oh, how wonderful! Does that mean I can finally leave this place and see the world outside?
textByHash.d790aaea40b7d7cb977b6200f5257a5475ce051a: The plagues mean that my master isn't allowed to leave. It's so boring here, and I'd like to travel.
textByHash.7c7081e1cb9f5cfcfe53b93a769423460d8051cb: My master has no interest in leaving. It's so boring here, and I'd like to travel.
textByHash.87c0776293dbda4a78d102e47f98605e4928a287: Travelling's what camels do best, you know.
textByHash.e1052038e76409deb5397dae0cacb42517787612: I don't suppose you could take me with you, could you?
textByHash.61c1ae42595154dec4d946f8669733cfbeab6694: Well, I haven't turned funny colours yet, so I'm probably not. Will you take me with you?
textByHash.54c5c75003c73e58b7ccc2f51926bd69f7c2445e: Oh well. Come back some time, and bring me news of the rest of the world.
